name: OverflowTabs
description: An intelligent tabs component that automatically moves overflowing tabs into a dropdown menu based on available space.
usage_guidelines: Use when tab count may exceed available width.
Automatically calculates visible tabs based on container width.

tabListClass.description: CSS classes for tab list container.

tabNavClass.description: CSS classes for individual tab nav items.

styling_info.visual_description: Standard tabs with automatic overflow handling. Excess tabs move to dropdown with count indicator. Responsive to container width changes.

Dont: Don't use for fixed small tab counts
Don't nest inside flex containers without constraints
Don't forget to test responsive behavior

Example.title: Example
